title: Spain beats Argentina in World Cup final and Messi says goodbye in tears
summary: The Spanish team was crowned champion after winning in extra time, while the Argentine star suffered defeat and Donald Trump was booed during the trophy presentation.

title: Extreme heat alert in Japan with temperatures up to 40 degrees and warnings in 42 prefectures
summary: The country is experiencing a heat wave after the end of the rainy season, with widespread heatstroke warnings and temperature records.

title: Keir Burnham takes office as new UK Prime Minister and promises major reforms
summary: The Labour leader returns to national politics after a month, receives congratulations from the Japanese prime minister, and announces a state transformation plan.

title: Chinese coast guard strikes Filipino soldiers in the South China Sea
summary: Several media outlets report that the Chinese coast guard used sticks against Filipino naval personnel on a disputed reef, in an incident that raises tensions in the region.

title: ASEAN foreign ministers meet to address South China Sea disputes
summary: The annual foreign ministers' meeting includes the participation of Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi and the case of aggression against the Philippines is expected to take center stage.

title: EU imposes record fine of over 100 billion yen on AliExpress for illegal products
summary: The fine, one of the largest against an e-commerce platform, is due to the lack of sufficient controls to prevent the sale of prohibited goods.

title: Three teams qualify for the Koshien summer baseball tournament
summary: Okinawa Shogaku, Shirokabezugaku, and Nichinan Gakuen secured their spots in the national high school tournament, highlighting Okinawa Shogaku's back-to-back championship.

title: Day of surprises at Nagoya sumo with defeats of yokozuna and ozeki
summary: The top ranks fell in several bouts, while Aoseikon, in his fight to regain the ozeki rank, achieved a decisive victory and remains at the top.

title: Katsunari Kakunaka, former batting champion, announces retirement from professional baseball
summary: The Chiba Lotte Marines player, who came from an independent league, decided to end his career after feeling shame over a strikeout he considered humiliating.

title: Chiben Gakuen team eliminated from Nara tournament and says goodbye to summer Koshien
summary: The spring selection runner-up lost in its prefecture and will not be able to participate in the national tournament, in a day of surprises in the Kinki region.

title: Yoshinobu Yamamoto reaches his tenth win of the season with a complete game without walks
summary: The Orix Buffaloes pitcher dominated for seven innings and helped break his team's losing streak, demonstrating characteristic solidity.

title: Princess Kiko attends charity concert for patients with intractable diseases
summary: The Japanese princess was visibly moved during the event, which aims to raise funds and raise awareness of the fight against difficult-to-treat illnesses.

title: Two new suspects arrested for stabbing murder of a man in Himeji
summary: The detainees, including a former superior of the victim, are accused of planning the crime for hire, according to police investigations.

title: Four months after Shin-Meishin highway accident that killed six, families demand justice
summary: A relative of one of the victims expresses their pain and demands answers, as the tragedy continues to affect the families.

title: Landslide in Tochigi buries elderly couple in their home
summary: The bodies of the residents, both former municipal officials, were found under the rubble of the house collapsed by heavy rains.

title: 22-year-old woman seriously injured after being hit by a jet ski off the coast of Hyogo
summary: The victim was hit by the watercraft driven by an acquaintance and suffered cardiorespiratory arrest, although she was later stabilized.

title: Woman dies after being hit by man who fell from a building in Nagoya
summary: The victim, who was returning home after dinner, was at the scene of the accident, which occurred in the middle of the street, and died instantly.

title: Fire at Japan Ground Self-Defense Force barracks in Asaka, no injuries
summary: The fire started in a garbage dump and was extinguished after one hour, with no personal injuries reported.

title: Japan to raise out-of-pocket medical expense caps from August and set annual limit
summary: The high-cost medical insurance system is being modified to increase the monthly maximum amounts and create a new annual ceiling, affecting patients with chronic illnesses.

title: Thousands protest in India against education minister under the slogan 'People's Party of Cockroaches'
summary: The opposition protest demands the minister's resignation over his management, while the ruling party agrees to meet with the demonstrators.

title: Search resumes in Taiwan for remains of Japanese WWII soldiers after half a century
summary: Excavations on a beach in southern Taiwan seek to recover the bodies of more than 100,000 Japanese soldiers who died in the area during the war.
